name: Lack of Administrator Control over Security
description: The product prevents administrators from customizing security settings for their environment. When administrators cannot manage security decisions, they cannot protect against threats, including insider threats from developers. Hard-coded credentials exemplify this problem.
detection_pattern: AUTH or CONTROL[security_setting] node has hardcoded or immutable configuration in STORAGE[config] with no META[admin_interface] or CONTROL[configurable] node allowing runtime modification of security parameters
